title: Publishes Attendant Assist Request deleted events
description: This schema describes the structure of the Attendant Assist Request deleted events published by the Attendant service when an assistance request is deleted.

id.description: The unique identifier of the deleted assistance request

workstationId.description: The workstation where the assistance request was created

basketId.description: The basket associated with the assistance request

businessUnitId.description: The business unit that the assistance request belonged to
